question: Which 5 patients have the highest total invoiced amount? Show both.
reference_sql: SELECT p.patient_name AS grp, SUM(i.total_amount) AS agg_value FROM invoices i JOIN appointments a ON i.appointment_id = a.appointment_id JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id GROUP BY p.patient_name ORDER BY agg_value DESC, grp ASC LIMIT 5

question: Rank patients by total invoiced amount and give the top 5.
reference_sql: SELECT p.patient_name AS grp, SUM(i.total_amount) AS agg_value FROM invoices i JOIN appointments a ON i.appointment_id = a.appointment_id JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id GROUP BY p.patient_name ORDER BY agg_value DESC, grp ASC LIMIT 5

question: List the top 5 patients by total invoiced amount, ties broken alphabetically.

question: Find the 5 patients with the greatest total invoiced amount.

question: Which 5 customers have the highest total spend? Show both.
reference_sql: SELECT c.customer_name AS grp, SUM(oi.quantity * pr.unit_price) AS agg_value FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN products pr ON oi.product_id = pr.product_id GROUP BY c.customer_name ORDER BY agg_value DESC, grp ASC LIMIT 5

question: Which 5 order lines have the highest discounted line value? Show entity and value.
reference_sql: SELECT oi.order_item_id AS entity, oi.quantity * pr.unit_price * (1 - oi.discount_percent / 100.0) AS metric FROM order_items oi JOIN products pr ON oi.product_id = pr.product_id ORDER BY metric DESC, entity ASC LIMIT 5

question: Top 10 products by units sold.

question: Top 4 categorys by revenue.
reference_sql: SELECT c.Name AS grp, SUM(d.LineTotal) AS agg_value FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN Product p ON d.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN ProductSubcategory s ON p.ProductSubcategoryID = s.ProductSubcategoryID JOIN ProductCategory c ON s.ProductCategoryID = c.ProductCategoryID GROUP BY c.Name ORDER BY agg_value DESC, grp ASC LIMIT 4

question: Which 4 categorys lead on revenue?
reference_sql: SELECT c.Name AS grp, SUM(d.LineTotal) AS agg_value FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN Product p ON d.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN ProductSubcategory s ON p.ProductSubcategoryID = s.ProductSubcategoryID JOIN ProductCategory c ON s.ProductCategoryID = c.ProductCategoryID GROUP BY c.Name ORDER BY agg_value DESC, grp ASC LIMIT 4

question: Rank categorys by revenue; give the top 4.
reference_sql: SELECT c.Name AS grp, SUM(d.LineTotal) AS agg_value FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN Product p ON d.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN ProductSubcategory s ON p.ProductSubcategoryID = s.ProductSubcategoryID JOIN ProductCategory c ON s.ProductCategoryID = c.ProductCategoryID GROUP BY c.Name ORDER BY agg_value DESC, grp ASC LIMIT 4

question: List the 4 categorys with the greatest revenue.
reference_sql: SELECT c.Name AS grp, SUM(d.LineTotal) AS agg_value FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN Product p ON d.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN ProductSubcategory s ON p.ProductSubcategoryID = s.ProductSubcategoryID JOIN ProductCategory c ON s.ProductCategoryID = c.ProductCategoryID GROUP BY c.Name ORDER BY agg_value DESC, grp ASC LIMIT 4
